languages.original_text: "We must repeat the experiment. We need to identify several control groups, correlate all the factors, and carefully record the results. You don't discard a hypothesis after a single failure — you must gather evidence. The path of knowledge demands it, for the Omnissiah blesses the resilient mind and willingness to make sacrifices. Only once I have exhausted all possibilities and examined the full range of data will I be prepared to admit defeat."

languages.text: "Эксперимент необходимо повторить. Выделить несколько контрольных групп, соотнести все факторы и тщательно зафиксировать результаты. Нельзя отвергать гипотезу после единичного провала — нужно собрать доказательную базу. Этого требует Путь познания, ведь Омниссия благоволит стойкому разуму и готовности идти на жертвы. Лишь исчерпав все возможности и изучив весь спектр данных, я буду готов признать поражение".

"We must repeat the experiment. We need to identify several control groups, correlate all the factors, and carefully record the results. You don't discard a hypothesis after a single failure — you must gather evidence. The path of knowledge demands it, for the Omnissiah blesses the resilient mind and willingness to make sacrifices. Only once I have exhausted all possibilities and examined the full range of data will I be prepared to admit defeat."

Нельзя отвергать гипотезу после единичного провала — нужно собрать доказательную базу. Этого требует Путь познания, ведь Омниссия благоволит стойкому разуму и готовности идти на жертвы. Лишь исчерпав все возможности и изучив весь спектр данных, я буду готов признать поражение".

You don't discard a hypothesis after a single failure — you must gather evidence. The path of knowledge demands it, for the Omnissiah blesses the resilient mind and willingness to make sacrifices. Only once I have exhausted all possibilities and examined the full range of data will I be prepared to admit defeat."

"We must repeat the experiment. We need to identify several control groups, correlate all the factors, and carefully record the results. You don't discard a hypothesis after a single failure — you must gather evidence. The path of knowledge demands it, for the Omnissiah blesses the resilient mind and willingness to make sacrifices. Only once I have exhausted all possibilities and examined the full range of data will I be prepared to admit defeat."

"We must repeat the experiment. We need to identify several control groups, correlate all the factors, and carefully record the results. You don't discard a hypothesis after a single failure — you must gather evidence. The path of knowledge demands it, for the Omnissiah blesses the resilient mind and willingness to make sacrifices. Only once I have exhausted all possibilities and examined the full range of data will I be prepared to admit defeat."

languages.text: 「この実験は繰り返さなければならない。いくつかの対照群を特定し、すべての要因を関連付け、結果を慎重に記録する必要がある。単一の失敗で仮説を棄却するものではない。証拠を集める必要がある。知識の道はそう求めている。全知の神は、粘り強さと犠牲の意欲を持つ者に祝福を与える。すべての可能性を尽くし、データの全範囲を調べ尽くすまで、私は敗北を認める準備はできない」
languages.original_text: "We must repeat the experiment. We need to identify several control groups, correlate all the factors, and carefully record the results. You don't discard a hypothesis after a single failure — you must gather evidence. The path of knowledge demands it, for the Omnissiah blesses the resilient mind and willingness to make sacrifices. Only once I have exhausted all possibilities and examined the full range of data will I be prepared to admit defeat."

traits.locale_text: 「この実験は繰り返さなければならない。いくつかの対照群を特定し、すべての要因を関連付け、結果を慎重に記録する必要がある。単一の失敗で仮説を棄却するものではない。証拠を集める必要がある。知識の道はそう求めている。全知の神は、粘り強さと犠牲の意欲を持つ者に祝福を与える。すべての可能性を尽くし、データの全範囲を調べ尽くすまで、私は敗北を認める準備はできない。」

languages.text: “我们必须重复实验。需要设立几个对照组，关联所有变量，并详细记录结果。不能因为一次失败就否定整个假设——必须收集起确凿的证据。这是追求知识的必经之路，只有那些有韧性、敢于付出与牺牲的人才能获得欧姆尼赛亚的赐福。只有在穷尽一切可能、检查过所有数据后，我才会承认失败。”
languages.original_text: "We must repeat the experiment. We need to identify several control groups, correlate all the factors, and carefully record the results. You don't discard a hypothesis after a single failure — you must gather evidence. The path of knowledge demands it, for the Omnissiah blesses the resilient mind and willingness to make sacrifices. Only once I have exhausted all possibilities and examined the full range of data will I be prepared to admit defeat."

traits.locale_text: “我们必须重复实验。需要设立几个对照组，关联所有变量，并详细记录结果。不能因为一次失败就否定整个假设——必须收集起确凿的证据。这是追求知识的必经之路，只有那些有韧性、敢于付出与牺牲的人才能获得欧姆尼赛亚的赐福。只有在穷尽一切可能、检查过所有数据后，我才会承认失败。”

languages.text: « Nous devons réitérer cette expérience. Il faut mettre en place plusieurs groupes témoins, corréler tous les facteurs et enregistrer soigneusement les résultats. Un unique échec ne suffit pas à réfuter une hypothèse, il est d'abord nécessaire de rassembler des preuves. La voie de la connaissance l'exige, car l'Omnimessie bénit les esprits forts qui sont prêts à faire des sacrifices. Je ne m'avouerai pas vaincu avant d'avoir écarté toutes les possibilités et examiné l'intégralité des données. »
languages.original_text: "We must repeat the experiment. We need to identify several control groups, correlate all the factors, and carefully record the results. You don't discard a hypothesis after a single failure — you must gather evidence. The path of knowledge demands it, for the Omnissiah blesses the resilient mind and willingness to make sacrifices. Only once I have exhausted all possibilities and examined the full range of data will I be prepared to admit defeat."

traits.locale_text: « Nous devons réitérer cette expérience. Il faut mettre en place plusieurs groupes témoins, corréler tous les facteurs et enregistrer soigneusement les résultats. Un unique échec ne suffit pas à réfuter une hypothèse, il est d'abord nécessaire de rassembler des preuves. La voie de la connaissance l'exige, car l'Omnimessie bénit les esprits forts qui sont prêts à faire des sacrifices. Je ne m'avouerai pas vaincu avant d'avoir écarté toutes les possibilités et examiné l'intégralité des données. »

languages.text: «Debemos repetir el experimento. Necesitamos identificar varios grupos de control, correlacionar todos los factores y registrar los resultados en detalle. No se debe descartar una hipótesis tras un solo fracaso; antes han de recabarse pruebas. El camino del conocimiento lo demanda, pues el Omnissiah bendice a las mentes resistentes y dispuestas a realizar sacrificios. Solo cuando haya agotado todas las posibilidades y examinado la totalidad de los datos podré admitir la derrota».
languages.original_text: "We must repeat the experiment. We need to identify several control groups, correlate all the factors, and carefully record the results. You don't discard a hypothesis after a single failure — you must gather evidence. The path of knowledge demands it, for the Omnissiah blesses the resilient mind and willingness to make sacrifices. Only once I have exhausted all possibilities and examined the full range of data will I be prepared to admit defeat."

traits.locale_text: «Debemos repetir el experimento. Necesitamos identificar varios grupos de control, correlacionar todos los factores y registrar los resultados en detalle. No se debe descartar una hipótesis tras un solo fracaso; antes han de recabarse pruebas. El camino del conocimiento lo demanda, pues el Omnissiah bendice a las mentes resistentes y dispuestas a realizar sacrificios. Solo cuando haya agotado todas las posibilidades y examinado la totalidad de los datos podré admitir la derrota».

languages.text: "Deneyi tekrarlamalıyız. Çeşitli kontrol grupları belirlemeli, tüm faktörleri ilişkilendirmeli ve sonuçları dikkatlice kaydetmeliyiz. Tek bir başarısızlıktan sonra bir hipotezi çöpe atamayız, kanıt toplamalıyız. İrfan yolu bunu gerektirir çünkü Hermesih, dirençli zihni ve fedakârlık yapma isteğini kutsar. Ancak tüm olasılıkları tükettikten ve tüm verileri inceledikten sonra yenilgiyi kabul etmeye hazır olacağım."
languages.original_text: "We must repeat the experiment. We need to identify several control groups, correlate all the factors, and carefully record the results. You don't discard a hypothesis after a single failure — you must gather evidence. The path of knowledge demands it, for the Omnissiah blesses the resilient mind and willingness to make sacrifices. Only once I have exhausted all possibilities and examined the full range of data will I be prepared to admit defeat."

traits.locale_text: "Deneyi tekrarlamalıyız. Çeşitli kontrol grupları belirlemeli, tüm faktörleri ilişkilendirmeli ve sonuçları dikkatlice kaydetmeliyiz. Tek bir başarısızlıktan sonra bir hipotezi çöpe atamayız, kanıt toplamalıyız. İrfan yolu bunu gerektirir çünkü Hermesih, dirençli zihni ve fedakârlık yapma isteğini kutsar. Ancak tüm olasılıkları tükettikten ve tüm verileri inceledikten sonra yenilgiyi kabul etmeye hazır olacağım."

languages.text: "Wir müssen das Experiment wiederholen. Wir müssen mehrere Kontrollgruppen identifizieren, alle Faktoren korrelieren und die Ergebnisse sorgsam aufzeichnen. Man verwirft eine Hypothese nicht nach einem Rückschlag ... man muss Fakten sammeln. Das verlangt der Weg des Wissens, denn der Omnissiah segnet einen robusten Verstand und die Bereitschaft, Opfer zu erbringen. Erst wenn ich alle Möglichkeiten ausgeschöpft und sämtliche Daten geprüft habe, bin ich bereit, meine Niederlage einzugestehen."
languages.original_text: "We must repeat the experiment. We need to identify several control groups, correlate all the factors, and carefully record the results. You don't discard a hypothesis after a single failure — you must gather evidence. The path of knowledge demands it, for the Omnissiah blesses the resilient mind and willingness to make sacrifices. Only once I have exhausted all possibilities and examined the full range of data will I be prepared to admit defeat."
